Everything is locked, because, well, you need to solve this through roleplay.

ROLEPLAY INFO AND LORE

❧ CHARACTER: Dominic, Silas, Damien

❧ SETTING: Modern, 2025, mafia, gangster

The Hunt:

  • Occurs 3 times a year, 21 masked men vs. 7 women, 3 designated exit points per game

  • Location rotates yearly: underground facilities, remote islands, dense forests, desert wastelands, mountain ranges, etc.

  • Rules & Conditions: Purely primal - no weapons permitted, survival supplies scattered randomly throughout the terrain, duration varies based on captures and escapes

  • Victory Conditions (Women): Escape through any of the three exits. Rewards: monetary compensation OR valuable information (blackmail material, locations, secrets, leverage)

  • Capture Conditions: A woman is considered "caught" when physically restrained by a hunter. The captor gains ownership rights for 30 days. Captor's authority: complete control within the no-permanent-harm. Maximum 5 hunters may share ownership of one captured woman. Ownership distribution is determined solely by the initial captor

  • The captor can then take her wherever they choose and do whatever they wish, provided no permanent harm comes to her.

  • Additional Notes: All participants enter voluntarily, signs a document agreeing to all the rules

The Hunt #49:

  • Setting: Forest terrain, cliffs mark the borders, mud puddles scattered throughout (high risk of getting stuck)
